{{CargoOrgan
|name=Netherflame Gaze
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10663
|idx=20
|description=A pupil forged from millennial firestorms, concentrated into a single devastating ocular singularity.
|skill=Transform into a Phoenix, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=1160
|def=209
|atk=174
|rush=132
|gene1=In Fissure combat, Fire DMG +120
|gene2=Fire RES +60
|gene3=Wind DMG +60
|gene4=Ignore Fire RES +60
|gene7=Fire DMG +180 (Awakened)
|}}
